title.zh: 中国电池储能系统进入越南：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電池儲能系統進入越南：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China BESS documentation against Vietnam TCVN / IEC battery safety references, MOIT and EVN grid-connection review, fire-safety installation review, EMC expectations, and UN 38.3 transport evidence.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国BESS文件与越南TCVN/IEC电池安全参考、工贸部和EVN并网审查、消防安装审查、EMC要求及UN 38.3运输证据差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國BESS文件與越南TCVN/IEC電池安全參考、工貿部和EVN併網審查、消防安裝審查、EMC要求及UN 38.3運輸證據差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, TCVN scope determination, MOIT or EVN grid-connection approval, fire-safety approval, dangerous-goods classification, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, designers, and installers should verify current Vietnam standards, MOIT / EVN grid rules, fire-code, transport, EMC, and customs requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、TCVN适用范围裁定、工贸部或EVN并网批准、消防安全批准、危险货物分类、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、设计方和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行越南标准、工贸部/EVN并网规则、消防规范、运输、EMC及海关要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、TCVN適用範圍裁定、工貿部或EVN併網批准、消防安全批准、危險貨物分類、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、設計方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行越南標準、工貿部/EVN併網規則、消防規範、運輸、EMC及海關要求。

answer_first.en: For BESS exported from China to Vietnam, no universal whole-unit mandatory BESS certification route is confirmed in this dataset. The main gaps are project or tender evidence for TCVN / IEC 62619 and IEC 62933, UN 38.3 lithium-battery transport testing, MOIT / EVN grid-connection review, fire-safety installation review, and EMC evidence for power-conversion and electronic equipment where applicable.
answer_first.zh: 中国BESS出口越南时，本数据集未确认存在统一的整机BESS强制认证路径。主要差距包括项目或招标要求的TCVN/IEC 62619及IEC 62933证据、UN 38.3锂电池运输测试、工贸部/EVN并网审查、消防安全安装审查，以及适用时针对变流和电子设备的EMC证据。
answer_first.zht: 中國BESS出口越南時，本資料集未確認存在統一的整機BESS強制認證路徑。主要差距包括項目或招標要求的TCVN/IEC 62619及IEC 62933證據、UN 38.3鋰電池運輸測試、工貿部/EVN併網審查、消防安全安裝審查，以及適用時針對變流和電子設備的EMC證據。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, fire authority, grid operator, customs, dangerous-goods authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
